answer.description: The answer given by the user in case the answerInputType is text.

answerInputType.description: The expected answer type. The possible values are: text, radioButton, unknownFutureValue.

answerOptions.description: In case the answerInputType is radioButton, this will consists of a list of possible answer values.

isRequired.description: Indicates whether it is mandatory to answer the custom question.

questionId.description: The ID of the custom question.

selectedOptions.description: The answers selected by the user.
